project.description:
TicTac Client - Build and Release

Flutter library for Torpedo chat (Tinode integration).

Auto-build (merge to main):

  1. Resolve dependencies
  2. Static analysis
  3. Unit tests
  4. Integration tests (Tinode dev server)

Manual release (Build with Parameters):

Same as above, plus version bump and git tag.

Links:

  • tictac repo

hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.name: RELEASE_TYPE
hudson.model.ChoiceParameterDefinition.description:
Leave as none for test-only builds (auto-trigger default).

patch (v1.2.3 -> v1.2.4) - Bug fixes
minor (v1.2.3 -> v1.3.0) - New features
major (v1.2.3 -> v2.0.0) - Breaking changes

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
IS_RELEASE="false" TAG_NAME="" BUILD_MODE="CI"
if [ "${RELEASE_TYPE}" != "none" ] && [ -n "${RELEASE_TYPE}" ]; then IS_RELEASE="true" BUILD_MODE="Release"
# Compute version now so it is available for build name and slack git remote set-url origin "https://${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/Play-Bonkers/tictac.git" git fetch --tags --prune --prune-tags
LATEST_TAG=$(git tag --sort=-v:refname | grep -E '^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$' | head -1) if [ -z "$LATEST_TAG" ]; then LATEST_TAG="v0.0.0" fi
VERSION="${LATEST_TAG#v}" IFS='.' read -r MAJOR MINOR PATCH <<< "$VERSION"
case "${RELEASE_TYPE}" in major) MAJOR=$((MAJOR + 1)); MINOR=0; PATCH=0 ;; minor) MINOR=$((MINOR + 1)); PATCH=0 ;; patch) PATCH=$((PATCH + 1)) ;; esac
TAG_NAME="v${MAJOR}.${MINOR}.${PATCH}" echo "==========================================" echo "TicTac Release Build: ${LATEST_TAG} -> ${TAG_NAME} (${RELEASE_TYPE})" echo "==========================================" else echo "==========================================" echo "TicTac CI Build (tests only)" echo "==========================================" fi
echo "IS_RELEASE=${IS_RELEASE}" > env.properties echo "TAG_NAME=${TAG_NAME}" >> env.properties echo "BUILD_MODE=${BUILD_MODE}" >> env.properties

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Resolve Dependencies" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE flutter pub get
echo "Dependencies resolved"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Static Analysis" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE flutter analyze --no-fatal-infos --no-fatal-warnings lib/
echo "Static analysis passed"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Unit Tests (42 tests)" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE flutter test test/tinode_test.dart test/models/access-mode_test.dart test/services/cache-manager_test.dart test/services/auth_test.dart
echo "Unit tests passed"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
echo "==========================================" echo "Integration Tests (16 tests, Tinode Dev)" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE flutter test test/integration/tictac_integration_test.dart --timeout 120s
echo "Integration tests passed"

#!/bin/bash set -e
export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.pub-cache/bin:$PATH"
# Skip release step unless manually triggered with a release type if [ "${IS_RELEASE}" != "true" ]; then echo "==========================================" echo "CI build complete -- all tests passed" echo "==========================================" exit 0 fi
echo "==========================================" echo "Tagging Release: ${TAG_NAME}" echo "=========================================="
cd $WORKSPACE
git config user.name "Jenkins CI" git config user.email "jenkins@playbonkers.com" git tag -a "${TAG_NAME}" -m "Release ${TAG_NAME}" git push origin "${TAG_NAME}"
echo "==========================================" echo "Released ${TAG_NAME}" echo "https://github.com/Play-Bonkers/tictac/releases/tag/${TAG_NAME}" echo "=========================================="
